text.p: Good day to you and the family. It was a very interesting moment getting to know you and living with you in . I strongly feel that i ought to have known you much earlier than now, but of course our two days interractions seemed to have bridged the gaps (though not enough) of our imagined relationship that should have being in the longer time. I hope that as we keep to the established contact, we will in the future overcome the remaining gaps.
I had a nice trip back to and delivered your felicitation to Dr. . He is highly happy that we met. I will compile the list of the fellowships i have and send it to you before the week runs out.
Kindly remain blessed and have my best regards for every member of your family.

Thank you for your reply. Good to know that your presentation went well, and that you got back to two hours earlier than scheduled. Thanks too for asking after my family. Everybody is fine, and yes, they were all happy to see me. I tried the landline you indicated in your mail just now. The answer I received was to the effect that the number does not exist. Could there have been an error somewhere?
